data.title: Create cross-epic-interaction-classifier haiku agent file
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Create `plugins/dso/agents/cross-epic-interaction-classifier.md` — a named haiku-tier sub-agent definition that receives the new epic's approach and success criteria alongside a batch of open epics' approach and success criteria, and returns structured JSON interaction signals with four-tier classification.

**File to create**: `plugins/dso/agents/cross-epic-interaction-classifier.md`

**Agent frontmatter**:
```yaml
---
name: cross-epic-interaction-classifier
model: haiku
description: Classifies cross-epic resource interactions by comparing a new epic's approach and success criteria against a batch of open/in-progress epics. Outputs structured JSON interaction signals with four-tier severity classification.
color: blue
---
```

**Agent receives** (as input context):
- `new_epic`: `{ id, title, approach_summary, success_criteria: [...] }`
- `open_epics`: array of `{ id, title, approach_summary, success_criteria: [...] }` (batch of up to 20)

**Agent outputs** (structured JSON):
```json
{
  "interaction_signals": [
    {
      "new_epic_id": "<new-epic-id>",
      "overlapping_epic_id": "<other-epic-id>",
      "overlapping_epic_title": "<title>",
      "severity": "benign" | "consideration" | "ambiguity" | "conflict",
      "shared_resource": "<specific resource — URL route, config key, DB table, etc.>",
      "description": "<explanation of the overlap>",
      "integration_constraint": "<falsifiable constraint if severity=consideration>"
    }
  ]
}
```

**Four-tier classification**:
- `benign`: shared namespace but non-overlapping claims — same technology/dependency with non-conflicting usage
- `consideration`: overlapping resource claim with resolvable integration detail needed
- `ambiguity`: same resource claimed by both with unclear ownership requiring human decision
- `conflict`: mutually exclusive strategies for the same resource

**Agent behavior rules**:
- Compare each open epic against the new epic independently (1xN, not NxN)
- Only emit a signal when a genuine resource overlap is detected; emit empty array when no overlaps found
- `shared_resource` must name the specific resource (e.g., "GET /api/users", "config key auth.provider", "DB table sessions") — not a generic category
- `integration_constraint` is required only when severity=consideration; null otherwise
- Do not emit signals for generic shared dependencies (same language, same framework) that have no actual resource claim overlap

## File Impact
- Create: `plugins/dso/agents/cross-epic-interaction-classifier.md`
- Update: `.test-index` with new agent file entry pointing to `tests/skills/test-brainstorm-cross-epic-scan.sh`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `plugins/dso/agents/cross-epic-interaction-classifier.md` exists with model: haiku frontmatter
  Verify: grep -q "model: haiku" plugins/dso/agents/cross-epic-interaction-classifier.md
- [ ] Agent file contains all four tier names: benign, consideration, ambiguity, conflict
  Verify: grep -q "benign" plugins/dso/agents/cross-epic-interaction-classifier.md && grep -q "consideration" plugins/dso/agents/cross-epic-interaction-classifier.md && grep -q "ambiguity" plugins/dso/agents/cross-epic-interaction-classifier.md && grep -q "conflict" plugins/dso/agents/cross-epic-interaction-classifier.md
- [ ] Agent file contains interaction_signals JSON field description
  Verify: grep -q "interaction_signals" plugins/dso/agents/cross-epic-interaction-classifier.md
- [ ] Agent file contains shared_resource field requirement
  Verify: grep -q "shared_resource" plugins/dso/agents/cross-epic-interaction-classifier.md
- [ ] `.test-index` updated to map agent file to test file
  Verify: grep 'cross-epic-interaction-classifier' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] `ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
